title: Optidium
description: This modpack aims to remake OptiFine on Fabric using sodium and keeping things like zoom and dynamic lights!
body: With Optidium we aim to remake the OptiFine experience with sodium. We aim to make it so you will still have your OptiFine cape, your zoom and dynamic lights while making it so it all runs on fabric. It is in my opinion of the best modpacks out there to do this.
